name: Walsten Marine
description: FAMILY OWNED & OPERATED SINCE 1972 and conveniently located right off of Highway 121, centrally located to Coboconk, Norland, Bobcaygeon, Minden, Haliburton and Fenelon Falls. We’re a reasonable drive from Orillia, Bracebridge and the Muskokan hotspot of Huntsville.
address: 3613 County Road 121, Kinmount, ON K0M 2A0, Canada

name: Vince Duchene Re/Max Professionals North
description: Real Estate listings with video walkthroughs and high quality photos for the Haliburton Highlands as well as landscaping advice, building construction advice, staging advice for Cottages, All forms of waterfront Real Estate, Homes and Property for sale. Vince Duchene, Re/Max North Country Realty, Inc.
address: 191 Highland Street suite 201, Haliburton, ON K0M 1S0, Canada

name: Coalition for Equitable Water Flow (CEWF)
description: The CEWF respectfully acknowledges that the lands and waters of its members are located on the traditional territory of the Williams Treaties First Nations which are Curve Lake, Rama, Hiawatha, Alderville, Scugog Island, Beausoleil and Georgina Island First Nations. The CEWF acknowledges a shared presence of Indigenous nations throughout the area, and recognizes its original, Indigenous inhabitants as the stewards of its lands and waters since time immemorial.
address: 1791 Rackety Trail Road, Minden, ON K0M 2K0, Canada

name: The Coalition of Haliburton Property Owners’ Associations (CHA)
description: The Coalition of Haliburton Property Owners’ Associations (CHA) is a member-driven group of approximately 50 property owners’ associations, representing more than 120 waterbodies and 15,000 shoreline properties from across the geographical limits of Haliburton County, in Ontario Canada.

name: FOCA (Federation of Ontario Cottage Associations)
description: Federation of Ontario Cottage Associations (FOCA) offers members various benefits and discounts arranged by FOCA
address: 159 King St #201, Peterborough, ON K9J 2R8, Canada

name: Team Cottage Country
description: Team Cottage Country brings a wealth of experience in real estate. We are praised for our outstanding customer service and superior local knowledge, and can offer the ultimate package of real estate services to you. Whether you are looking at buying or selling a property in Haliburton or Muskoka we are confident that you will be 100% satisfied. We will work with you through every step of the process to achieve your Ontario real estate goals.
address: 4490 Kennisis Lake Road, Haliburton, Ontario K0M 1S0, Canada

name: Troy Austen Real Estate Team
description: RE/MAX Professionals North, Brokerage A lifelong Haliburton resident and Redstone Lake cottager; successful Team builder and leader; and top selling RE/MAX career agent, Troy has the area knowledge, business experience, and professional network to guide you profitably, efficiently and dependably. Trust in Troy and his Team for caring service for you and the Lake!

description: Trails, tours, stargazing and year-round events at the 100,000-acre forest next door — the events calendar our newsletters often point to.
